name: inteleon
flavor_text: It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air.

moves.name: snipe-shot
moves.effect: Sets Reflect on the user’s side of the field after inflicting damage.

moves.name: pound
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: bind
moves.effect: Prevents the target from fleeing and inflicts damage for 2-5 turns.

moves.name: growl
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage.

moves.name: water-gun
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: tearful-look
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage.

moves.name: sucker-punch
moves.effect: Only works if the target is about to use a damaging move.

moves.name: soak
moves.effect: Changes the target’s type to Water.

moves.name: acrobatics
moves.effect: Has double power if the user has no held item.

moves.name: agility
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Speed by two stages.

moves.name: air-cutter
moves.effect: Has an increased chance for a critical hit.

moves.name: air-slash
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: attract
moves.effect: Target falls in love if it has the opposite gender, and has a 50% chance to refuse attacking the user.

moves.name: baton-pass
moves.effect: Allows the trainer to switch out the user and pass effects along to its replacement.

moves.name: blizzard
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: bounce
moves.effect: User bounces high into the air, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.

moves.name: breaking-swipe
moves.effect: Lowers the target’s Attack by one stage after inflicting damage.

moves.name: dark-pulse
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: dive
moves.effect: User dives underwater, dodging all attacks, and hits next turn.

moves.name: endure
moves.effect: Prevents the user’s HP from lowering below 1 this turn.

moves.name: facade
moves.effect: Power doubles if user is burned, paralyzed, or poisoned.

moves.name: fling
moves.effect: Throws held item at the target; power depends on the item.

moves.name: flip-turn
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: focus-energy
moves.effect: Increases the user’s chance to score a critical hit.

moves.name: giga-impact
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: haze
moves.effect: Resets all Pokémon’s stats, accuracy, and evasion.

moves.name: hydro-cannon
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: hydro-pump
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: hyper-beam
moves.effect: User foregoes its next turn to recharge.

moves.name: ice-beam
moves.effect: Has a 10% chance to freeze the target.

moves.name: icicle-spear
moves.effect: Hits 2-5 times in one turn.

moves.name: icy-wind
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: light-screen
moves.effect: Reduces damage from special attacks by 50% for five turns.

moves.name: liquidation
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Defense by one stage.

moves.name: metronome
moves.effect: Randomly selects and uses any move in the game.

moves.name: mud-shot
moves.effect: Has a 100% chance to lower the target’s Speed by one stage.

moves.name: muddy-water
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to lower the target’s accuracy by one stage.

moves.name: protect
moves.effect: Prevents any moves from hitting the user this turn.

moves.name: psych-up
moves.effect: Discards the user’s stat changes and copies the target’s.

moves.name: rain-dance
moves.effect: Changes the weather to rain for five turns.

moves.name: reflect
moves.effect: Reduces damage from physical attacks by half.

moves.name: rest
moves.effect: User sleeps for two turns, completely healing itself.

moves.name: round
moves.effect: Has double power if it’s used more than once per turn.

moves.name: safeguard
moves.effect: Protects the user’s field from major status ailments and confusion for five turns.

moves.name: scald
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to burn the target.

moves.name: shadow-ball
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to lower the target’s Special Defense by one stage.

moves.name: skitter-smack
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: sleep-talk
moves.effect: Randomly uses one of the user’s other three moves.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: smack-down
moves.effect: Removes any immunity to Ground damage.

moves.name: snore
moves.effect: Has a 30% chance to make the target flinch.  Only works if the user is sleeping.

moves.name: substitute
moves.effect: Transfers 1/4 of the user’s max HP into a doll, protecting the user from further damage or status changes until it breaks.

moves.name: surf
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage and can hit Dive users.

moves.name: swift
moves.effect: Never misses.

moves.name: swords-dance
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages.

moves.name: take-down
moves.effect: User receives 1/4 the damage it inflicts in recoil.

moves.name: taunt
moves.effect: For the next few turns, the target can only use damaging moves.

moves.name: u-turn
moves.effect: User must switch out after attacking.

moves.name: vacuum-wave
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: water-pledge
moves.effect: With Grass Pledge, halves opposing Pokémon’s Speed for four turns.

moves.name: water-pulse
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to confuse the target.

moves.name: waterfall
moves.effect: Has a 20% chance to make the target flinch.

moves.name: weather-ball
moves.effect: If there be weather, this move has doubled power and the weather’s type.

moves.name: whirlpool
moves.effect: Prevents the target from leaving battle and inflicts 1/16 its max HP in damage for 2-5 turns.

moves.name: work-up
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack and Special Attack by one stage each.

moves.name: aqua-jet
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: aqua-ring
moves.effect: Restores 1/16 of the user’s max HP each turn.

moves.name: double-team
moves.effect: Raises the user’s evasion by one stage.

moves.name: fell-stinger
moves.effect: Raises the user’s Attack by two stages if it KOs the target.

moves.name: ice-shard
moves.effect: Inflicts regular damage with no additional effect.

moves.name: mist
moves.effect: Protects the user’s stats from being changed by enemy moves.

moves.name: scale-shot
moves.effect: Boosts the user’s Speed and lowers their Defense by one stage after inflicting damage two to five times in a row.

abilitiesDetailed.name: torrent
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Strengthens water moves to inflict 1.5× damage at 1/3 max HP or less.

abilitiesDetailed.name: sniper
abilitiesDetailed.effect: Strengthens critical hits to inflict 3× damage rather than 2×.
